elements.description: Typed memo page on pink paper with two hole-punch marks at the top and a red handwritten underline under the name 'ENGLISH'. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams present.

judge.reason: The two descriptions contradict each other on the specific visual element: Description A claims a handwritten blue 'X' over the name 'ENGLISH', while Description B claims a handwritten red underline under the name 'ENGLISH'.
